game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Extreme Landings Pro** Players pilot various aircraft using a virtual joystick for pitch and roll, a rudder slider for yaw, and a throttle slider for engine power, while interacting with a detailed 3D cockpit UI by tapping switches and buttons to manage systems like landing gear, flaps (with 5 distinct settings), and spoilers. The core gameplay involves managing complex aircraft systems, including individual engine ignition, fuel balancing (e.g., jettisoning excess fuel), and responding to over 5,000 potential emergency scenarios like engine fires or hydraulic failures by following specific procedural checklists via UI prompts. Navigation is achieved using instruments like the Primary Flight Display (PFD) and Navigation Display (ND, showing 8000+ waypoints), coupled with an Instrument Landing System (ILS) for precision approaches to over 500 accurate airport replicas, all influenced by real-time weather conditions including microbursts and icing. Progression occurs through completing 36 structured missions, each with specific objectives (e.g., "land safely with one engine out"), and 216 challenges that test specific piloting skills, earning pilot ranking points based on performance metrics like landing accuracy (e.g., within 10 meters of centerline) and emergency resolution speed. A mission is successfully completed upon a safe landing within specified parameters (e.g., runway alignment, vertical speed below 300 ft/min), while failure results from crashing, exceeding critical system limits (e.g., overspeeding landing gear), or failing to meet mission objectives within time or safety constraints.
game_info.description: Pilot a realistic aircraft through challenging landing scenarios. Navigate using your instruments, manage critical systems like engines and flaps, and respond to emergencies. Complete missions by landing safely within strict parameters while dealing with system failures, weather conditions, and fuel management. Your goal is to touch down smoothly on the runway centerline with proper speed and alignment.
game_info.controls:
W/S: Pitch control (nose up/down)
A/D: Roll control (bank left/right)
Arrow Left/Right: Rudder (yaw control)
Arrow Up/Down: Throttle (engine power)
Space: Deploy/Retract landing gear
Shift: Toggle flaps (5 settings)
Z: Deploy spoilers
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic flight controls and aircraft responsiveness. Verify that all control inputs (pitch, roll, yaw, throttle) properly affect the aircraft's physics body and that the plane can be maneuvered through the air space without immediate failure.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Apply moderate control inputs in sequence - pitch up/down, roll left/right, rudder movements, and throttle adjustments. Maintain stable flight for at least 300 frames without crashing or entering a critical state. Test all control surfaces respond correctly to inputs.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Aircraft should respond smoothly to all control inputs, maintain stable flight when controls are neutral, and show realistic physics behavior. Test succeeds if the aircraft remains airborne and controllable for the duration without errors or crashes.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing successful landing sequence and mission completion. Verify that the aircraft can complete a full approach, deploy landing gear and flaps, touch down on the runway within acceptable parameters, and trigger the win condition properly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Start with appropriate altitude and speed. Deploy landing gear and flaps at correct times. Guide aircraft to runway using gradual pitch and roll adjustments. Reduce throttle for approach. Align with runway centerline and touchdown gently with proper vertical speed and alignment.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Aircraft successfully lands on runway with vertical speed below 300 ft/min, aligned with centerline within acceptable deviation, landing gear deployed, and at safe speed. Game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN with success message and performance metrics displayed.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing emergency scenarios and system failure handling. Verify that engine failures, hydraulic issues, and other emergencies are properly triggered, displayed to the player, and affect aircraft performance realistically.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Trigger random emergency scenarios during flight. Attempt to continue flight and landing with degraded systems. Test that emergencies affect aircraft handling (reduced power, control issues) and that UI properly indicates active emergencies and required actions.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Emergencies are triggered randomly, displayed clearly in UI, affect aircraft performance appropriately, and can be managed by the player. Game remains playable but more challenging. Emergency resolution or successful landing despite failures should be possible.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing fuel management system. Verify that fuel decreases over time based on throttle settings, aircraft becomes lighter as fuel burns, low fuel warnings appear, and running out of fuel causes appropriate consequences.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Monitor fuel levels during extended flight with varying throttle settings. Test that higher throttle burns fuel faster. Verify aircraft weight and performance changes as fuel depletes. Test low fuel warning triggers and fuel exhaustion scenario.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Fuel system properly tracks consumption, displays current levels in UI, affects aircraft weight/performance, shows warnings at low levels, and causes engine failure if fuel runs out. All fuel-related game mechanics function correctly without errors.
TEST_4.description: Testing fuel management system. Verify that fuel decreases over time based on throttle settings, aircraft becomes lighter as fuel burns, low fuel warnings appear, and running out of fuel causes appropriate consequences.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing crash detection and game over conditions. Verify that crashes (terrain impact, excessive speed, wrong angle) are properly detected and trigger appropriate game over state with clear failure messaging.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: All crash scenarios properly detected and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Clear feedback shows why the crash occurred. Player can restart using R key. Physics behaves realistically during crash without errors or game freezing.
TEST_5.description: Testing crash detection and game over conditions. Verify that crashes (terrain impact, excessive speed, wrong angle) are properly detected and trigger appropriate game over state with clear failure messaging.
TEST_5.expected: All crash scenarios properly detected and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Clear feedback shows why the crash occurred. Player can restart using R key. Physics behaves realistically during crash without errors or game freezing.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing instrument displays and navigation aids. Verify that altitude, speed, heading, vertical speed indicators update correctly and provide accurate information for navigation. Test that ILS guidance appears when approaching runway.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Monitor all instrument readings during various flight maneuvers. Compare instrument values to actual aircraft state. Verify instruments update smoothly at 60 FPS. Test that ILS localizer and glideslope indicators appear and guide player toward runway when in approach phase.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: All instruments display accurate real-time data matching aircraft state. Readings are smooth and readable. ILS guidance activates at appropriate distance/altitude from runway and provides clear visual cues for proper approach path. No flickering or incorrect values.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Verify that ESC properly pauses/unpauses game, physics freeze during pause, and R key correctly resets all game state back to start screen without errors or memory leaks.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Start game, fly for a period, press ESC to pause. Verify all motion stops and UI shows pause state. Press ESC again to unpause and verify game resumes correctly. Then trigger game over and press R to restart, checking all state resets properly.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Pause freezes all game logic and physics while maintaining display. Unpause seamlessly resumes from exact same state. Restart completely resets game state, clears all entities, returns to start screen, and allows new game to begin without any residual state from previous session.
